strings.clearCacheTitle: 🚨 THE CALAMITY RISES: Hylian, are you certain? Clearing the cache will trigger the Great Cataclysm. Your custom Tunics, your ancient Hylian scrolls, and your entire Hero’s Journey will be wiped from history. The Master Sword will sleep, and the Kingdom will fall into shadow. Do you wish to reset the Timeline to Zero?
